items.title: Exploratory visualization of high-dimensional data
items.description: Project tabular, image-feature, or text-embedding matrices to 2D/3D UMAP coordinates for cluster discovery, outlier spotting, and hypothesis generation before labeling.

items.title: Single-cell and genomics workflows
items.description: Visualize thousands of cells in gene-expression space; UMAP maps are standard EDA alongside marker validation in contemporary biology pipelines.

items.title: NLP embedding inspection
items.description: Plot sentence or document embeddings from transformers to inspect semantic neighborhoods, topic structure, and annotation errors in unlabeled corpora.

items.title: Image and audio feature exploration
items.description: Embed CNN or spectrogram features with UMAP to see whether classes, augmentations, or domains form separable manifolds invisible in PCA.

items.title: Preprocessing sanity checks
items.description: Compare UMAP layouts before and after scaling, filtering, or batch correction to verify that preprocessing preserves intended biological or semantic groupings.
